title: The Best 10 Herbal Tinctures for Throat Irritation Symptoms
description: Achillea millefolium tincture, also known as yarrow, is good for throat irritation because it has anti-inflammatory properties. This means it can help reduce swelling and pain in the throat. The tincture also contains a compound called flavonoid, which has antihistamine effects. This helps to stop the release of histamine, a chemical that can cause itching and inflammation in the throat.
